message.content: The screen displays a two - section layout. On the left, a verification page with a white background has a header showing the Sana AI logo and navigation links (Overview, Pricing, etc.). The main content includes a “We sent you a code” heading, a “Please wait” subtext, an 8 - digit code input field, a “Resend code” link, and two buttons: a dark “Back” and a light “Continue”. Below, there’s a legal text block. On the right, a dark - themed laptop screenshot shows the Sana AI interface with a bright yellow task card. The footer has the Sana AI logo and “curated by Mobbin”. Colors are minimal: white, dark gray, black, and a pop of yellow. Interactions focus on code entry and navigation.
